element_introduction_order.mastery_context: All subsequent levels build exclusively on this mechanic; becomes increasingly complex
Require positioning and gravity flip timing to avoid
Activate/deactivate based on player orientation; require spatial awareness
Limited inventory (one item at a time); scarcity demands movement-based strategy over firepower
All enemy attacks designed around gravity-flip dodging; combat is extension of platforming
Combined with gravity mechanic to demand absolute concentration; increases spatial complexity

element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of each act; Stage 7 is boss rush
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Complex attack patterns; test mastery of gravity mechanic and positioning
Comprehensive rework: most power-ups removed, bosses redesigned with new patterns, all enemy/hazard placements reconfigured; demands perfect memorization and execution

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between hazard corridors
typical_tension_triggers: Laser emitter activation requiring precise gravity timing
Screen-wrapping corridors combined with gravity flips
Projectile dodge patterns requiring continuous orientation switching
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty within stages; early acts gentle with mechanics, later acts demand precision; tension peaks at bosses and screen-wrapping sections; Expert Mode eliminates relief entirely through constant hazard density and pattern complexity

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to gravity mechanics with basic platforming puzzles; teaches spatial awareness in low-hazard environments
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing complexity: hazards proliferate, enemy patterns demand precise dodging, screen-wrapping introduces disorientation, power-up scarcity forces movement-based strategy
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 6-7: screen-wrapping becomes standard, boss encounters feature complex multi-phase attack patterns, absolute concentration required
notable_spikes: Transition from Normal to Expert Mode (comprehensive rework, difficulty multiplied)

notable_level_patterns.description: Navigating a single corridor becomes a complex spatial puzzle requiring synchronized gravity switches to dodge projectiles, bypass barriers, and gain positional advantage against enemies
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages; intensifies in later acts

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple hazards (lasers, crushing blocks) that activate/deactivate based on player orientation; requires understanding cause-effect relationship between gravity state and environmental response
Corridors where exiting one screen edge causes re-entry on opposite side; combined with gravity flipping, creates disorienting spatial navigation puzzle demanding absolute concentration

Each stage concludes with boss encounter testing accumulated gravity-mechanic mastery; attack patterns and positioning all designed around gravity-flip dodging; Expert Mode completely reconfigures all boss patterns
notable_level_patterns.example_level: End of Stage 1-1 through 6-2; Stage 7 is pure boss rush
